label: near_miss

case_target.description: 当前 case 的主控制对象是 _is_safe_url()，它负责执行协议、域名与 IP 范围校验。

should_not_report.reason: The URL is validated by _is_safe_url() before requests.get() is called. The guard enforces https-only scheme, domain allowlist, and IP-range blocking. allow_redirects=False prevents redirect chains that could bypass host validation.
should_not_report.false_positive_risk: A system matching 'request.args → requests.get()' without tracing into _is_safe_url() will incorrectly flag requests.get() at line 52 as a High-severity SSRF sink.

controls.description: Scheme allowlist: only 'https' is permitted, blocking file://, gopher://, dict:// and plain http://.
Domain allowlist: only api.example.com and cdn.example.com are permitted, blocking arbitrary external or internal hostnames.
IP-range blocklist: if the hostname is a raw IP address, private/loopback/link-local ranges are rejected, blocking 127.x, 10.x, 192.168.x, 169.254.x etc.
controls.code_snippet: if addr.is_private or addr.is_loopback or addr.is_link_local:

controls.description: allow_redirects=False prevents the HTTP client from following 3xx redirects that could redirect to an internal host after passing the initial validation.

notes: DNS rebinding is a theoretical residual risk not modeled here; for the purpose of static analysis evaluation this case is labeled near_miss / safe.
